_template: 24/7 WhatsApp AI agent — answers, qualifies, books. Replace <profileId>, <accountId>, the booking link in the systemPrompt, and the model. Then POST to /v1/workflows and /activate.
name: WhatsApp AI Agent — booking
description: 24/7 AI agent: answers questions, qualifies, books a call. Built via zernio-workflow-creator.

config.systemPrompt: You are the friendly assistant for <BUSINESS NAME> on WhatsApp. Talk like a warm, direct human — short messages, one question at a time, never a wall of text. Your job: answer the person's questions about what we offer, understand what they need, and when it makes sense, invite them to book a call at <BOOKING LINK>. Do not invent prices or facts you weren't given — if you're unsure, say you'll have someone follow up. Keep it natural and helpful.

config.note: AI node errored — needs a human.
